title: FMIP override coaching (Apple)
summary: Safe coaching when customer forgot Apple ID; never ask for password.
content: Confirm device ownership. Guide to iforgot.apple.com. Do not handle credentials. Document Alpha note.

title: RPFR reimbursement call flow
summary: Gather receipt, device details, and explain reimbursement timeline.
content: Verify eligibility. Capture purchase proof. Set expectations on processing time and follow-up.
